output:
Batch 4 remains blocked for true manual validation in this environment. There is no interactive browser/editor session and no timeline E2E harness in the repository, so I could not execute the five requested UI scenarios directly. Best-effort automated validation did pass: `npx vitest run --config config/testing/vitest.config.ts src/tools/video-editor/lib/timeline-save-utils.test.ts` passed (5/5 tests), and `npx eslint src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useTimelineSave.ts src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useTimelineData.ts src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useTimelineState.ts src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useTimelineState.types.ts src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useTimelineRealtime.ts src/tools/video-editor/components/VideoEditorShell.tsx` passed.

Best-effort checkpointing was not written because `.megaplan/plans/light-megaplan-fix-the-20260327-0056/execution_batch_4.json` was not writable.
deviations: Manual validation for T6 remains blocked because this environment has no interactive browser/editor session and no dedicated E2E harness for the timeline editor. Only targeted automated verification was possible.

task_updates.executor_notes: Unable to complete the five requested manual UI scenarios from this CLI session. I verified the repository does not contain a usable Playwright/Cypress timeline harness for this flow, then ran best-effort automated checks instead: the existing `timeline-save-utils` Vitest suite passed (5/5), and targeted ESLint passed on the touched save/realtime/UI files. Manual verification of rapid clip moves, two-tab concurrent edits, polling recovery, live overlap prevention, debounce behavior, and the exhausted-conflict dialog flow still requires an interactive editor session.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: I cannot confirm that all five success criteria pass from this environment. Criteria (1) through (5) are manual editor behaviors that require an interactive browser session with the timeline UI, and this workspace does not include a runnable E2E harness for them. Supporting automated checks did pass: the existing `timeline-save-utils` Vitest suite passed (5/5), and targeted ESLint passed on the touched save/realtime/UI files. Manual confirmation for rapid clip moves, two-tab saves, polling sync, overlap prevention in the live editor, debounce behavior, and the exhausted-conflict dialog remains pending.
